tool_args.label: Jamaica AM OTP End of Year 2025
Jamaica PM OTP End of Year 2025

payload.description: Station renovations completed at Mastic-Shirley included a new sheltered 2,000 square foot plaza area, new LED lighting, illuminated bollards, digital information screens, new bike rack, upgraded security and communications systems, along with refurbished and repainted railings, concrete repairs to the platform and the ADA ramp, replaced tactile warning strips, new station signage, new benches, granite seating and a granite planter.

The 128-year-old Webster Avenue roadway bridge, located over the LIRR's Port Washington Branch in Manhasset, was completely replaced. The project included new retaining walls, catch basins and other drainage improvements, along with a new roadway and sidewalks. The new structure is a 77-foot, 3 span bridge which carries two lanes of traffic and reflects a widened roadway along with greater clearance underneath the bridge.

Three LIRR stations were made ADA accessible: St. Albans, Locust Manor and Laurelton, all located in Queens. Replacement of one elevator and one escalator at Valley Stream and replacement of one elevator at Auburndale station. Scope included new elevators and elevator machine rooms, LED lighting, upgrades to communications, power and security systems, new signage, new/upgraded pedestrian tunnels and abutment walls, Help Points.

A dedicated task force established by MTA Strategic Initiatives partnered with the LIRR to improve Jamaica on-time performance and enhance the transfer experience at Jamaica Station. A performance target was set for 70% of all trains arriving within three minutes of schedule at Jamaica.

tool_args.label: Added revenue service between Jamaica and Grand Central Madison

payload.description: Added revenue service between Jamaica and Grand Central Madison, departing weekdays at 5:10 AM and 5:18 AM
The 2025 bi-annual Customer Satisfaction Survey was conducted in the fall

tool_args.label: PGA's Ryder Cup at Bethpage Black 2025

payload.description: 154,000 customers attended the Ryder Cup at Bethpage Black

payload.description: GCM stabilized at 40% of AM Peak travel to Manhattan, while 60% used Penn Station

tool_args.label: SOGR and ADA improvements at Gibson station

payload.description: Completed SOGR and ADA improvements at Gibson station
Achieving substantial completion of the new Yaphank Station

tool_args.label: LIRR is busiest commuter railroad in North America

payload.claim_text: The Long Island Rail Road remained the busiest commuter railroad in North America
payload.description: LIRR remains the busiest commuter railroad in North America

payload.claim_text: City Ticket sales for Peak and Off-peak periods exploded to 29% of 2025's total ticket sales, contributing to overall ridership growth
payload.description: City Ticket sales grew to 29% of total ticket sales

payload.claim_text: The station 'Spruce-Up' program resulted in increased cleaning and enhanced customer experience
payload.description: LIRR station Spruce-Up program increased cleaning and enhanced customer experience

tool_args.label: 117 out of 126 LIRR stations ADA accessible

payload.claim_text: As of December 2025, a total of 117 out of 126 LIRR stations are ADA accessible
payload.description: ADA accessibility milestone

payload.claim_text: TrainTime App integrating the ability to purchase mobile tickets, along with information on crowding and accessibility
payload.description: Technology applications offering better service through TrainTime app
Customer satisfaction survey result fall 2025

payload.claim_text: Non-Commutation ridership has been consistently surpassing 2019's pre-pandemic levels and is expected to continue increasing outpacing the Commutation market
payload.description: Non-Commutation ridership trajectory

payload.claim_text: Recent fare changes and new offerings including a Day Pass, the Family Fare expansion (up to 17 years of age), and the pay-as-you-go to a free trip (10+1) for mobile customers, along with allowing reduced fares (i.e., senior citizens) during Peak hours will continue providing incentives for ridership growth
payload.description: New fare products and policy changes
